markdownRemark.html:
Hi. I'm Paweł Kosiec.

I'm a Full-stack Cloud Developer located in Gliwice, Poland.

I write back-end services in Go, and modern front-ends using JavaScript (React.js). I work in cloud-native environment, extending Kubernetes and building microservices.

I am both Certified Kubernetes Application Developer and Certified Kubernetes Administrator.

In 2018 I have completed a master's in Computer Science at Silesian University of Technology.

I'm open source and cloud-native enthusiast. That's why I'm a co-organizer of the Gophers Silesia meetup, which is a local community interested in Go & cloud-native topics.
